# GalleryVerticalEnd

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::GalleryVerticalEnd;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        GalleryVerticalEnd { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
carousel, pictures, images, scroll, swipe, album, portfolio, history, versions, backup, time machine
